name: The Young Ones
overview: The misadventures of four lunatic students who live in a shared student house. There's Rick, the overblown political one addicted to Cliff Richard, Vyvyan the experimental scientific one/part-time anarchist, Neil the worried hippy, and Mike the ladies' man (at least he is in his mind).

trailers.title: The Young Ones S1E03   Boring Vyvyan's friends
